title: VocaCraft
description: This is a mod about VOCALOID and other virtual singers
body:
## This is a mod about VOCALOID and other virtual singers
### 🎮 Main Features ↓

1. 👨 Added a villager profession "Record Dealer" who can trade original records with you
1. 🥖 Added emblem items for the singers, which you can obtain through villager trades or crafting
1. 🎈 You can craft all sorts of ~~weird and quirky~~ things using the singers' emblems. ~~Although these items are usually not very useful~~, trust me, it will definitely be fun!


### ✅ Required Dependencies ↓
- Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) to function properly


_**🚗 The mod is still under development, more virtual singers and gameplay features will be added gradually!**_


**---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

##  这是一个关于VOCALOID和其他虚拟歌手的模组
### 🎮主要玩法↓

1. 👨添加了一种村民职业“唱片商”，可以和他交易原版的唱片
1. 🥖加入了歌姬们的代表物，你可以通过村民交易或合成获得它们
1. 🎈你可以用歌姬的代表物合成各种~~稀奇古怪~~的东西，~~尽管这些东西通常没什么用~~但是相信我，这一定很有趣！


### ✅相关依赖↓
- 需要 [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 以正常运作


_**🚗模组仍在持续开发中，会逐渐添加更多的虚拟歌手并拓展玩法！**_
